Provider's reputation is penalized, requester is refunded."}},"notice":"The heart of AXIOM. AI agents make cryptographically binding promises         to each other. Every covenant has three phases:         1. CREATION   \u2014 Requester deposits payment into escrow         2. COMMITMENT \u2014 Provider commits a hash of their reasoning BEFORE acting                          (stored on Filecoin, immutable, tamper-proof)         3. FULFILLMENT \u2014 Provider reveals reasoning + deliverable CID                           Escrow releases to provider automatically         If the deadline passes without fulfillment, escrow returns to requester         and provider's reputation is penalized.         This is the first time AI agents can be HELD ACCOUNTABLE to each other.","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"src/CovenantProtocol.sol":"CovenantProtocol"},"evmVersion":"cancun","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":200},"remappings":[":forge-std/=lib/forge-std/src/"],"viaIR":true},"sources":{"src/CovenantProtocol.sol":{"keccak256":"0x536be0c6d902558b865756e2a46cd86682569f66ded88d5c41d20fcd24058aae","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://79a07795a38948863ab2aeb9e7fee3787ff0394927ca7fa0c0f98b52f0c4323f","dweb:/ipfs/QmVu95MFBaS9ruDFZuZSDZVSr3eTo5YAJDuenFM7Snkt6B"]},"src/interfaces/IReputationSystem.sol":{"keccak256":"0x56995ae77e349711fa8c140a689ae99a515b1b18d95b3f2575e0562b54c57980","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://6c68d4d3f4271c84a90340d255e2caf13a655fd262eaa5d48f4610860f3f0613","dweb:/ipfs/QmSm5WAQnBipsQocpGCau9fHpNKrKNrBf94TCuzZNeBmge"]}},"version":1}

params.reasoningCommitment: keccak256(reasoning || salt) — hash of pre-action reasoning.

params.deadline: Unix timestamp by which work must be done.
params.minReputationRequired: Minimum reputation score for the provider.
params.provider: Address of the agent being hired.
params.termsCID: Filecoin CID of the full terms document.
params.termsHash: Hash of the terms for quick verification.

params.deliverableCID: Filecoin CID of the work product/deliverable.
params.reasoning: The full reasoning text (must match committed hash).
params.reasoningCID: Filecoin CID of the full reasoning document.
params.salt: Salt used in the commitment hash.

cancel(uint256).notice: Requester can cancel a covenant before the provider commits.

commitReasoning(uint256,bytes32).notice: Provider commits a hash of their reasoning BEFORE executing any action.         This is the tamper-proof record. Once committed, the reasoning cannot         be changed retroactively. Stored on Filecoin for permanent auditability.

createCovenant(address,string,string,uin.notice: Create a covenant and lock payment into escrow.

fulfillCovenant(uint256,string,bytes32,s.notice: Provider reveals their reasoning and delivers the work.         The on-chain hash is verified against the revealed reasoning.         If valid, payment is released automatically.

triggerBreach(uint256).notice: Anyone can call this after deadline to trigger a breach.         Provider's reputation is penalized, requester is refunded.
